text.title: Blurred Roles and Team Evolution Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces. Validator script enforces required keys and forbidden patterns.

example.note: Missing required fields; violates schema constraints for `blurred-roles-team-evolution`. Validator rejects with explicit violation list.

section.title: Forbidden patterns
section.pattern: roles array with fewer than 3 entries
duplication entry with fewer than 2 owners
